THE PETITION WAS FILED AND PERSONALLY SERVED ON MAY 20, 2014. MOVING PARTY ONLY PROVIDED EIGHT COURT DAYS NOTICE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kit L. Knudsen, Esq. of Commins & Knudsen PC, Tel. 415.391.6490, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. Plaintiff submits on the tentative ruling, therefore the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PETITIONER KIT KNUDSEN'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The petition was filed and personally served on May 20, 2014. Moving party only provided eight court days notice. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189.
